name: Termix
description: Manage your servers with built-in SSH, tunnels, and file access
compose:
name: slashnode-termix
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/lukegus/termix:release-2.4.1
    container_name: termix
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:6444:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-termix_web_data
